task_completion.description: Create a timeline diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax with the correct title and year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application is open with a timeline diagram canvas. The title 'Cloud ERP Migration Roadmap 2025' is visible on the diagram.

task_completion.description: Include Phase 1 (Assessment & Planning) and its milestones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline contains a section or nodes labeled with 'Assessment' and 'Planning' (Jan-Mar), along with milestones for 'Infrastructure Audit' (Jan 31) and 'Migration Plan' (Mar 15).

task_completion.description: Include Phase 2 (Data Migration) and its milestones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline contains a section or nodes labeled with 'Data Migration' (Apr-Jun), along with milestones for 'Data Mapping' (Apr 30) and 'Test Migration' (Jun 15).

task_completion.description: Include Phase 3 (Application Migration) and its milestones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline contains a section or nodes labeled with 'Application Migration' (Jul-Sep), along with milestones for 'Core Modules' (Aug 15) and 'Integration Testing' (Sep 30).

task_completion.description: Include Phase 4 (Go-Live & Optimization) and its milestones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline contains a section or nodes labeled with 'Go-Live' and 'Optimization' (Oct-Dec), along with milestones for 'Production Cutover' (Oct 15) and 'Performance Baseline' (Dec 15).

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram as migration_timeline.eddx in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or file manager showing the file 'migration_timeline.eddx' being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG image to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog box or file manager showing the file 'migration_timeline.png' being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, ideally with export settings showing a minimum width of 1200px.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax application window with its toolbars, shape libraries, and canvas being actively used, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually constructed a timeline diagram using shapes and connectors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas contains distinct graphical elements (timeline axis, milestone markers, text boxes) rather than just a single pasted block of text.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in save and export features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax 'File' menu, 'Save As' dialog, or 'Export' dialog being interacted with.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Documents/migration_timeline.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Documents/migration_timeline.png. Required year: 2025. Required phase labels: Assessment, Planning, Data Migration, Application Migration, Go-Live, Optimization. Required milestone labels: Infrastructure Audit, Migration Plan, Data Mapping, Test Migration, Core Modules, Integration Testing, Production Cutover, Performance Baseline.
